data.content: Shipment review approved. Remote `main` still points to shipped commit `09b25b326af60d42e665dd7e0b2975828372244c`, the knot carries both tagged commits (`659c1ad25cff`, `09b25b326af6`) plus the branch tag, and GitHub runs `CI` and `Coverage Badge` are both `completed/success` for the shipped SHA. The shipped code matches the requested installer behavior and there were no blocking regressions detected.
